meaning: n.[化]阿特拉津,莠去津(一种除草剂)
examples: A method was developed to determine atrazine and acetochlor in water.
A new dispersing agent (WPJ - a) for 38% atrazine suspension concentrates was developed.
Recent review of current progress of study on microorganisms degradation and transforming into atrazine was presented abroad.
However, the work has been questioned by the primary producers of atrazine, the Swiss-based agrochemical giant Syngenta.
One of the world's most commonly used herbicides, atrazine, poses a serious threat to frogs and other amphibians, American scientists claim.
